Nadeu_2022_tumour_cluster_case12

Author

Pakorn Sagulkoo

Import the relevant packages and set working path directory

# Attach the packages you will need for the analysis.
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(harmony)
library(tidyverse)
library(DT)
# Check working path
getwd()
[1] "/mnt/hp-storage/users/pakorns/scRNAseq/Nadeu2022_NatMed_scRNAseq_data"

Define parameters

# Paths
path_to_obj <- here::here("reanalysis/results/R_objects/4.seurat_leukemic.rds")
path_to_save <- here::here("reanalysis/results/R_objects/5.seurat_clustered_12.rds")


# Colors
color_palette <- c("black", "gray", "red", "yellow", "violet", "green4",
                   "blue", "mediumorchid2", "coral2", "blueviolet",
                   "indianred4", "deepskyblue1", "dimgray", "deeppink1",
                   "green", "lightgray", "hotpink1")


# Source functions
source(here::here("bin/utils.R"))

Load data

seurat <- readRDS(path_to_obj)

Subset and reprocess

# Re-downstream analysis after subsetting
seurat <- subset(seurat, donor_id == "12")
seurat <- process_seurat(seurat, dims = 1:20)
DimPlot(seurat, group.by = "subproject")
# Analyse in BCLLATLAS_10 
seurat <- subset(seurat, subproject == "BCLLATLAS_10")
seurat <- process_seurat(seurat, dims = 1:20)

  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma")

# Re-clustering after selecting BCLLATLAS_10
seurat <- FindNeighbors(seurat, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:20)
Computing nearest neighbor graph
Computing SNN
seurat <- FindClusters(seurat, resolution = 0.4)
Modularity Optimizer version 1.3.0 by Ludo Waltman and Nees Jan van Eck

Number of nodes: 2896
Number of edges: 111987

Running Louvain algorithm...
Maximum modularity in 10 random starts: 0.8425
Number of communities: 7
Elapsed time: 0 seconds
DimPlot(seurat)
# Filter out low quality cells
seurat <- subset(seurat, seurat_clusters != "4")
seurat <- process_seurat(seurat, dims = 1:20)
DimPlot(seurat)
DimPlot(seurat, group.by = "time_point")

Cluster

seurat <- FindNeighbors(seurat, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:20)
Computing nearest neighbor graph
Computing SNN
seurat <- FindClusters(seurat, resolution = 0.3)
Modularity Optimizer version 1.3.0 by Ludo Waltman and Nees Jan van Eck

Number of nodes: 2780
Number of edges: 109191

Running Louvain algorithm...
Maximum modularity in 10 random starts: 0.8717
Number of communities: 6
Elapsed time: 0 seconds
DimPlot(seurat)
# CCND2 expression 
FeaturePlot(seurat, "CCND2") + scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma")
Scale for colour is already present.
Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.
# Find subclusters based on the CCND2 expression
seurat <- FindSubCluster(
  seurat,
  cluster = c("2"),
  graph.name = "RNA_snn",
  subcluster.name = "CCND2_subclusters",
  resolution = 0.2
)
Modularity Optimizer version 1.3.0 by Ludo Waltman and Nees Jan van Eck

Number of nodes: 356
Number of edges: 15183

Running Louvain algorithm...
Maximum modularity in 10 random starts: 0.8034
Number of communities: 2
Elapsed time: 0 seconds
DimPlot(seurat, group.by = "CCND2_subclusters")
# Explore remaining microenvironment cells in the tumour cells
microenv_markers <- c("CD3D", "NKG7", "LYZ")
feat_plots_microenv <- purrr::map(microenv_markers, function(x) {
  p <- FeaturePlot(seurat, x) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma")
  p
})

Doublet removal

These codes below are run for doublet removal but our reanalysis results rarely found the doublets then we did not use these.

# doublets <- CellSelector(DimPlot(seurat))

Final clustering:

seurat$final_clusters <- seurat$CCND2_subclusters
Idents(seurat) <- "final_clusters"
DimPlot(seurat)

Save

saveRDS(seurat, path_to_save)
